name: Spicy Olive & Cheese Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a hot skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add onions, mushrooms, and celery to the pan; cook for 3-4 minutes.
3. Stir in rice for another minute.
4. Pour in water and add dried chicken and seafood stock mixes.
5. Bring mixture to a boil.
6. Add remaining ingredients except cheese.
7. Reduce heat to medium; simmer until almost all liquid is absorbed (about 30 minutes).
8. Adjust heat to low, cover, and cook for another 10-15 minutes.
9. Stir in Parmesan cheese and allow rice to sit for an additional 5 minutes before serving.
